title: Display Dashboard Reports in Side Pane Detail Tab
story: As a DataTools Pro user viewing dashboards, I want to see the list of reports contained in a dashboard in the detail side pane, so that I understand which reports make up each dashboard without leaving the page.
description:
When a user clicks on a Dashboard-type record in the Reports and Dashboards tab, a new "Reports" tab should appear in the detail side pane showing the reports belonging to that dashboard.

## Workflow
1. User clicks on a Dashboard-type record
2. A "Reports" tab appears in the side pane (styled consistently with other tabs)
3. User clicks the Reports tab
4. The system executes the same metadata analysis process used by Metrics Analyst's "Analyze Dashboards" feature
5. Reports are displayed with a button to open each report in Salesforce

## Reuse
Reuses the same Salesforce metadata analysis process from the Metrics Analyst page (Import from Salesforce > select dashboard > Analyze Dashboards). The code was refactored for reuse between Metrics and Reports/Dashboards contexts.

## Data Model Consideration
Currently the dashboard-report relationship is not persisted — the analysis runs each time. A future enhancement could persist the junction table (1 report : many dashboards) for faster loading.
acceptance_criteria: Clicking a Dashboard-type record shows a 'Reports' tab in the side pane
Reports tab only appears for Dashboard-type records, not Report-type
Clicking the Reports tab triggers the dashboard analysis process
A loading indicator is shown while the analysis runs
Reports are displayed with their names and a link to open in Salesforce
Reports tab CSS matches other side pane tabs
The analysis uses the correct dashboard context (not Metrics defaults)
ux_changes: New Reports tab in the detail side pane for Dashboard-type records. Shows child reports with Salesforce launch buttons. Loading indicator during analysis.
middleware_changes: Refactored dashboard analysis logic for reuse between Metrics Analyst and Reports/Dashboards contexts. Ensures correct dashboard selection context.
api_changes: Reused and adapted the dashboard analysis AJAX endpoint to accept dashboard context from the Reports/Dashboards page.
implementation_notes: Reused the Metrics Analyst 'Analyze Dashboards' functionality. Developer encountered an issue where the default Metrics selections were being used instead of the Reports/Dashboards context — required careful scoping. Code working on development but initially had merge issues getting to staging. Data model for persisting dashboard-report junctions proposed as a future enhancement.
comment_summary: Developer studied the Metrics Analyst flow and identified code reuse opportunities. Encountered a context issue where Metrics defaults were being loaded instead of the selected dashboard. Impact analysis estimated 7 hours (Large). Discussed data model for junction table with senior developer. Code merge to staging initially had issues. Eventually resolved and confirmed working after a re-login.
